speaker: CEO
text: We delivered strong revenue growth this quarter and remain confident in our strategy.

speaker: CFO
text: Margin improved and we are raising guidance for the full year.

speaker: Analyst
text: What about next quarter risks and macroeconomic uncertainty?

speaker: CEO
text: We see stable demand but inflation and supply chain pressure remain challenges.

speaker: Analyst
text: How should we think about margins if inflation continues?

speaker: CFO
text: We believe we are well positioned to manage cost pressures going forward.
